data.title: Magis Continues Buyback, Lifts Treasury Stake to 0.51% of Capital
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from MAGIS S.p.A. ( (IT:MGS) ) is now available.

Magis S.p.A., a specialist in customized adhesive tapes and closure systems for baby and adult body-care, continued to execute its authorized share buyback and disposal program on the EGM market of Borsa Italiana. The company leverages advanced printing technologies and a strong sustainability focus to serve clients seeking high-quality, tailored solutions in personal care closures.

Between 17 and 23 March 2026, Magis acquired 100 treasury shares at an average price of about €9.8 per share, for a total outlay of €980. Following these purchases, Magis holds 29,878 treasury shares, representing approximately 0.51% of its share capital, signaling ongoing capital management activity that may support share liquidity and provide flexibility for future corporate actions.

More about MAGIS S.p.A.

Magis S.p.A., based in Cerreto Guidi in Tuscany, is a leader in producing customized adhesive tapes and closure systems for baby and adult body-care products and is listed on the EGM market of Borsa Italiana under the ticker MGS. Founded in 1983, the company was an early innovator in hot melt coating on polypropylene and protected printing, and it emphasizes high-quality, highly customizable printing and environmental sustainability in its manufacturing processes.

Average Trading Volume: 3,003

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: €60.63M

Learn more about MGS stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

Livzon Pharmaceutical Group ( (HK:1513) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Livzon Pharmaceutical Group has adjusted the composition of its board-level committees, reinforcing its corporate governance framework. The company appointed employee representative director Ms. Ran Yongmei to the Strategy Committee and executive director Mr. Tang Yanggang to the Nomination Committee, with both changes effective from March 24, 2026.

These appointments are expected to broaden representation and executive input in strategic planning and director nomination processes, while the overall structure of the board committees remains unchanged. The move signals a fine-tuning rather than an overhaul of governance, suggesting continuity in oversight with incremental improvements to decision-making and stakeholder alignment.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1513) stock is a Sell with a HK$22.99 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Livzon Pharmaceutical Group stock, see the HK:1513 Stock Forecast page.

More about Livzon Pharmaceutical Group

Livzon Pharmaceutical Group Inc. is a China-based pharmaceutical company focused on the research, development, manufacturing, and distribution of medicines and healthcare products. Listed in Hong Kong, the company operates with a board structure that includes executive, non-executive, independent, and employee representative directors overseeing its strategic and governance functions.

Average Trading Volume: 774,806

Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

Keysight Technologies ( (KEYS) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 19, 2026, Keysight Technologies held its Annual Meeting of Stockholders, with approximately 91% of the 171.5 million eligible common shares represented, and shareholders elected three directors, ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as independent auditor for fiscal 2026, and approved an advisory vote on executive compensation for fiscal 2025. Investors also backed a management proposal to declassify the board of directors, moving toward annual elections, and approved a shareholder proposal to allow investors to call special meetings, signaling a shift toward enhanced corporate governance and greater shareholder rights at the company.

The most recent analyst rating on (KEYS) stock is a Buy with a $320.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Keysight Technologies stock, see the KEYS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on KEYS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, KEYS is a Outperform.

The score is driven by strong financial quality (notably cash generation and a solid balance sheet) and an upbeat earnings call with strong guidance, orders, and margins. Offsetting factors are overbought technical conditions that raise near-term pullback risk and a high P/E valuation; the sharp prior TTM revenue contraction remains a key fundamental watch item.

To see Spark’s full report on KEYS stock, click here.

More about Keysight Technologies

Keysight Technologies, Inc. is a U.S.-based technology company that provides electronic design and test solutions, including measurement instruments, software, and services used across communications, electronics, aerospace, and related industries. Its products support customers in designing, validating, and manufacturing advanced electronic systems and networks, positioning the firm as a key supplier to high-performance technology markets.

data.title: IceCure Medical Names New CFO and Plans Key Leadership Changes Amid ProSense® Growth
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Icecure Medical ( (ICCM) ) has shared an update.

On March 19, 2026, IceCure Medical appointed veteran finance executive Meir Peleg as its new Chief Financial Officer, with his tenure set to begin on May 17, 2026, bolstering the company’s leadership as it reports strong commercial momentum for its ProSense® cryoablation system following recent U.S. regulatory clearance and professional endorsement in low-risk breast cancer. IceCure also outlined leadership changes in technology and clinical strategy, including the planned second-quarter 2026 appointment of breast surgical oncologist Dr. Richard Fine as Medical Director to lead breast indications and the April 12, 2026 departure of Vice President of R&D and Engineering Naum Muchnik, as the company initiates a search for a new Chief Technology Officer.

The most recent analyst rating on (ICCM) stock is a Hold with a $0.61 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Icecure Medical stock, see the ICCM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ICCM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ICCM is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (large ongoing losses, significant cash burn, and shrinking equity), with limited valuation support due to negative earnings. Offsetting this, the latest earnings call points to improving commercial prospects and multiple adoption catalysts (FDA clearance, society endorsement, planned salesforce expansion), while technicals remain weak/neutral.

To see Spark’s full report on ICCM stock, click here.

More about Icecure Medical

IceCure Medical Ltd. is an Israel-based medical device company that develops and markets minimally invasive, liquid-nitrogen-based cryoablation systems for the destruction of benign and cancerous tumors. Its flagship ProSense® system, cleared and approved in markets including the U.S., Europe and Asia, targets breast, kidney, bone and lung cancers and has U.S. marketing authorization for local treatment of low-risk breast cancer in women aged 70 and above.

data.title: Renforth Raises $1 Million, Advances Parbec Drilling and Geoscience Outreach
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Renforth Resources ( (TSE:RFR) ) has provided an announcement.

Renforth Resources has closed a C$1 million private placement, issuing 40 million units at $0.025 each to investor Frank Guillemette, who also received warrants and agreed to support management through a voting arrangement for three years. The financing, completed with no fees, brings in a strategic investor with a track record in successful gold exploration transactions, potentially strengthening Renforth’s shareholder base and leadership support.

The company has initiated permitting for a 60,000-metre, two-year drill program at its Parbec Gold Deposit in Malartic, Québec, aimed at refining an underground bulk sample target, increasing and upgrading gold ounces, and testing updated geological interpretations. Concurrently, Renforth is advancing surface work at Parbec and has launched a province-wide sponsorship of Geologize training for more than 3,000 Ontario geoscience students, reinforcing its operational momentum at Parbec while investing in the future workforce of Canada’s mining and critical minerals industry.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:RFR) stock is a Hold with a C$0.02 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Renforth Resources stock, see the TSE:RFR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on RFR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RFR is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by weak financial performance (pre-revenue, ongoing losses and cash burn, and negative equity/declining assets). Technicals are somewhat supportive with price holding above key moving averages, but momentum is mixed and near-term signals show overbought risk. Valuation is also a headwind due to ongoing losses and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on RFR stock, click here.

More about Renforth Resources

Renforth Resources Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on developing critical minerals and gold assets in Québec. The company’s portfolio includes the Parbec Gold Deposit along the Cadillac Break near Malartic, positioning it within a key Canadian mining jurisdiction with exposure to both precious and critical metals markets.

Renforth operates in the early-stage and advanced exploration segment, seeking to grow its resource base through drilling, geological modelling and surface work. It is also building ties with the broader mining ecosystem by supporting geoscience education, reflecting a longer-term commitment to talent development in Canada’s critical minerals sector.

Average Trading Volume: 238,107

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$9.64M

data.title: Enzon Executes Reverse Stock Split Ahead of Viskase Merger
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Enzon Pharmaceuticals ( (ENZN) ) is now available.

On March 23, 2026, Enzon Pharmaceuticals entered into an eleventh amendment to its Section 382 Rights Agreement, extending the final expiration of the rights from March 24 to March 26, 2026, with all other terms unchanged. Management stated that this brief extension of the tax-focused rights plan is in the best interests of the company and its stockholders, maintaining protections around its equity structure ahead of key corporate actions.

On March 24, 2026, Enzon announced that a previously approved 1‑for‑100 reverse stock split would become effective that day at 4:30 p.m. Eastern, with the stock expected to begin trading on a split‑adjusted basis on the OTCQB under the temporary symbol ENZND on March 25. The reverse split, which consolidates every 100 common shares into one and settles fractional positions in cash, was undertaken to free up authorized shares needed to complete the anticipated merger with Viskase and an associated exchange offer for its Series C preferred stock, with the exchange offer set to expire at 5:00 p.m. Eastern on March 24, 2026 and the merger closing expected as soon as practicable thereafter.

More about Enzon Pharmaceuticals

Enzon Pharmaceuticals, Inc., together with its subsidiary, is positioned as a public company acquisition vehicle that has sought to become an acquisition platform. The company’s shares trade on the OTCQB market and it is currently being used as the corporate vehicle for a planned merger with Viskase Companies, Inc., aligning its activities around transactional and capital markets objectives.

Average Trading Volume: 78,001

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $4.45M

For a thorough assessment of ENZN stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Bank of Chongqing Publishes 2025 Annual Results and Details Report Availability
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Bank of Chongqing Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:1963) ) has issued an announcement.

Bank of Chongqing Co., Ltd., a PRC-incorporated joint stock commercial bank, holds a domestic financial licence and corporate legal person business licence, operating under mainland regulatory oversight. It is not classified as an authorised institution in Hong Kong, is outside the Hong Kong Monetary Authority’s supervision, and is not allowed to conduct banking or deposit-taking activities in the Hong Kong market.

The bank’s board has announced its audited annual results for the year ended December 31, 2025, and confirmed that the full 2025 annual report will be made available to H shareholders in April 2026. Both Chinese and English versions of the results announcement, as well as a PRC GAAP Chinese annual report, will be accessible via the Bank’s and the relevant stock exchanges’ websites, enhancing transparency and regulatory compliance for investors across its dual listings.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1963) stock is a Buy with a HK$8.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bank of Chongqing Co., Ltd. Class H stock, see the HK:1963 Stock Forecast page.

More about Bank of Chongqing Co., Ltd. Class H

Bank of Chongqing Co., Ltd. is a joint stock commercial bank incorporated in the People’s Republic of China with limited liability. The bank operates under a PRC financial licence and corporate legal person business licence, but it is not an authorised institution under Hong Kong’s Banking Ordinance and is not supervised by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority or permitted to conduct banking or deposit-taking business in Hong Kong.

data.title: Thermo Fisher Completes Strategic Acquisition of Clario Holdings
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Thermo Fisher ( (TMO) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On March 24, 2026, Thermo Fisher Scientific announced it had completed the $8.875 billion cash acquisition of Clario Holdings, Inc., a leading provider of endpoint data solutions for clinical trials, with additional deferred and performance-based payments possible. Clario will be integrated into Thermo Fisher’s Laboratory Products and Biopharma Services segment, expanding the company’s capabilities in digital collection, management and analysis of clinical trial endpoint data, a platform that has already supported about 70% of FDA and EMA novel drug approvals over the past decade.

Management described Clario as a strong strategic fit that strengthens Thermo Fisher’s position as a trusted partner to pharma and biotech customers by enabling faster, better-informed drug development decisions through advanced technology and data intelligence. Thermo Fisher highlighted Clario’s high growth and strong margin profile, expecting double-digit internal rates of return, high single-digit revenue growth, accretion to adjusted operating margin and adjusted EPS in the first year, and approximately $175 million in adjusted operating income from synergies by year five, underscoring the deal’s significance for shareholders and the company’s broader biopharma services strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (TMO) stock is a Buy with a $670.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Thermo Fisher stock, see the TMO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TMO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TMO is a Neutral.

The score reflects solid underlying fundamentals and supportive 2026 guidance (profitability, strong free cash flow, and expected organic/EPS acceleration), partly offset by weaker balance-sheet flexibility from higher leverage and a notably bearish technical picture. Valuation is also a headwind given the high P/E and very low dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on TMO stock, click here.

More about Thermo Fisher

Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc., headquartered in Waltham, Mass., is a global leader in serving science with annual revenue of more than $40 billion. The company provides innovative technologies, analytical instruments, laboratory products, diagnostics, and pharmaceutical services that support life sciences research, complex analysis, clinical diagnostics, and the development and manufacture of therapies through brands such as Thermo Scientific, Applied Biosystems, Invitrogen, Fisher Scientific, Unity Lab Services, Patheon and PPD.

Its offerings are aimed at pharma and biotech companies, academic and government labs, and healthcare providers seeking to increase productivity, solve analytical challenges, and improve patient outcomes. By combining technologies, purchasing convenience and biopharma services, Thermo Fisher positions itself as a comprehensive partner across the drug development and manufacturing value chain, with a stated mission to help customers make the world healthier, cleaner and safer.

Average Trading Volume: 2,360,127

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $177.6B

Find detailed analytics on TMO stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Maven Income and Growth VCT 3 Expands Share Capital in Ongoing Fundraise
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Maven Income and Growth VCT 3 ( (GB:MIG3) ).

Maven Income and Growth VCT 3 has continued its current equity fundraising, issuing 2,937,681 new ordinary shares after receiving valid applications totalling about £1.41 million for the 2025/26 tax year. The new shares, priced between 46.58p and 47.81p, increase the total shares in issue to 150,375,031, which now represents the company’s total voting rights for regulatory disclosure purposes.

The trust plans further allotments for both the 2025/26 and 2026/27 tax years, with total applications under the ongoing offer now reaching approximately £7.79 million across both periods. Admission of the latest tranche of shares to trading on the London Stock Exchange’s main market is expected around 25 March 2026, underscoring the VCT’s active capital-raising effort to support its investment strategy and provide additional liquidity for investors.

More about Maven Income and Growth VCT 3

Maven Income and Growth VCT 3 PLC is a UK-listed venture capital trust focused on providing investors with access to a diversified portfolio of smaller, growth-oriented private and AIM-quoted companies. The trust offers tax-efficient exposure to the UK smaller companies sector through new ordinary share issues and ongoing capital raises.

Average Trading Volume: 23,909

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy
